seoTitle: Rockley Mount vs Rockton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Rockley Mount and Rockton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Rockley Mount vs Rockton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rockley Mount and Rockton.
heading: Rockley Mount vs Rockton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rockley Mount, New South Wales and Rockton, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rockton has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Rockley Mount (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rockley Mount or Rockton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rockley Mount has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Rockton scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rockley Mount scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Rockton scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rockley Mount or Rockton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rockton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
